overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk game showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from a covered plaza with giant holographic billboards through a dark underpass and into an open cityscape with towering skyscrapers, wet reflective streets, and visible rain falling through streetlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban plaza with giant illuminated billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered plaza beneath massive glowing advertisements

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screens displaying advertisements with warm yellow and red tones
shiny wet concrete tiles reflecting the overhead lights and billboards
geometric concrete architectural beams forming the plaza ceiling
dark rectangular information booth or terminal on the right side
tall street lamp with green illuminated base

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a covered urban plaza with massive illuminated billboards overhead casting warm light onto wet reflective pavement. The camera moves forward through this semi-enclosed space with angular concrete architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with support columns

events.description: entering dark underpass with significantly reduced lighting compared to the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through a dimly lit covered walkway with concrete support columns

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction through the underpass on the left side

entered.detail: low concrete ceiling of the covered walkway extending into the distance
vertical concrete pillars lining the right side of the walkway
bright light visible at the far end of the tunnel indicating the exit

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark covered underpass with low lighting and concrete support columns. A pedestrian walks ahead on the left as the camera moves toward the bright exit light at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city intersection with towering neon skyscrapers

events.description: exiting underpass into open urban area with expansive neon skyline and towering buildings
turning left to view the illuminated city skyline with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and pausing to look at the neon cityscape before continuing along the street

entered.detail: towering skyscrapers covered in blue and red neon lights and digital advertisements
elevated highway or monorail track crossing above the street
tall building with multiple large digital screens showing advertisements
multi-lane asphalt road with yellow dividing lines and vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass reveals a breathtaking open cityscape with towering neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic billboards. The camera turns to admire the skyline before continuing along the wet street beneath an overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with modern curved architecture and street lighting

events.description: rain becomes visible as streaks in the street light beams

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet city street as rain begins to fall, passing modern buildings

entered.detail: futuristic building with curved glass facade and illuminated windows
concrete safety barrier along the elevated sidewalk
covered bus stop or transit shelter with glass panels
tall street lights with bright white illumination and green digital displays
futuristic cars parked along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along a city street with a modern curved building on the right and an elevated walkway railing on the left. Rain becomes visible in the street light beams as the scene progresses, with parked vehicles visible along the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with transit shelter and city views

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated walkway approaching and passing a transit shelter

notable_agents.action: walking in the opposite direction carrying an umbrella

entered.detail: solid concrete barrier with vertical slits overlooking the city below
enclosed bus shelter with illuminated interior and seating
glowing red and blue billboards on distant buildings across the cityscape

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking along an elevated concrete walkway with safety railings, approaching and passing a transit shelter. The neon-lit city skyline remains visible in the background as rain continues to fall, and a pedestrian with an umbrella walks in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban plaza into a sprawling, rain-slicked cyberpunk cityscape. It begins by moving through a semi-enclosed plaza where massive illuminated billboards cast a warm glow onto reflective pavement and angular concrete architecture. As the camera enters a dim, concrete underpass, the lighting drops sharply before the view opens up to a breathtaking skyline of towering neon skyscrapers and holographic displays. The scene then shifts to a wet city street where rain becomes visible within the beams of streetlights, passing by a modern curved building and parked vehicles. Finally, the camera ascends onto an elevated concrete walkway, passing a transit shelter and a pedestrian with an umbrella while the neon city remains luminous in the background.
